issue.title: Add Requests API and reflection fixture

fixture_cases.focus: PSR-4 Requests classes, interfaces, constants, properties, and method signatures
legacy Requests_* aliases resolve through the bundled autoloader with deprecations silenced
representative header, cookie, hook, response, proxy, auth, and session object surfaces instantiate without transport I/O
future generated wrappers must preserve original paths, class visibility, reflection, and overlay manifests
Requests notice/provenance remains preserved before distribution divergence or copied package retirement

downstream_issue.title: Add Requests API and reflection fixture

required_observations: WpOrg\Requests\Exception and HTTP status exception classes
api_reflection_gate.acceptance: Preserved upstream Requests package and candidate replacement expose matching public classes, constants, constructor/method signatures, exception classes, hook interfaces, cookie/header/session/proxy/transport objects, namespace aliases, and reflection-visible behavior.
api_reflection_gate.fallback_policy: Keep wp-includes/Requests copied from upstream until this fixture exists and passes for both preserved upstream and candidate replacement paths.
api_reflection_gate.removal_gate: Do not replace the Requests package or cite generated wrapper ownership until WPHX-323.08 records passing API/reflection evidence.

downstream_issue.title: Add Requests API and reflection fixture

required_observations: Generated original-path files preserve wp-includes/Requests package paths or documented autoload-compatible aliases
Composer/autoload, namespace, class_exists, interface_exists, trait_exists, and stack-trace behavior stay plugin-visible
Generated wrapper bodies contain no hand-authored durable public PHP and cite WPHX PHP or approved compiler/profile evidence
Package overlay manifest records each candidate file difference from preserved upstream Requests
generated_wrapper_gate.acceptance: Generated wrapper or adapter emission is proven as a public ABI artifact before any Requests distribution file diverges from upstream.
generated_wrapper_gate.fallback_policy: If wrapper emission cannot preserve ecosystem-visible Requests behavior, renew the preserved upstream exception instead of replacing the package.
generated_wrapper_gate.removal_gate: Do not ship a divergent Requests package without generated wrapper evidence, overlay manifest evidence, and passing API/transport gates.

downstream_issue.title: Add Requests API and reflection fixture

required_observations: Requests notice and license files remain preserved while copied
Replacement/wrapper distribution records source, license, notices, and file-level provenance
Any external runtime dependency is accepted only when the official WordPress distribution has an equivalent dependency assumption
license_provenance_gate.acceptance: License/provenance review is updated before generated replacement or dependency-wrapper distribution changes.
license_provenance_gate.fallback_policy: Keep the preserved upstream Requests package if provenance, notice, or dependency assumptions are not settled.
license_provenance_gate.removal_gate: Do not remove Requests notice/provenance records or distribute replacement files without an updated license manifest.

mirror_roots.note: Both roots are regenerated from the preserved upstream WordPress 7.0 Requests package. The candidate root is not a generated replacement.
